description: Learning how computers think, how to write code, and how to solve problems using math and logic.
scope: Extremely broad; you can work on mobile apps, website backends, cloud computing, or even space exploration software.

description: Focusing on the step-by-step process of building large, reliable software and making sure it works perfectly for users.
scope: High demand for roles like systems architect, project manager, or quality assurance engineer in large tech firms.

description: Teaching machines how to learn from data, recognize faces, understand speech, and make smart decisions.
scope: Growing rapidly in self-driving cars, smart assistants, and personalized medical diagnosis tools.

description: Looking at huge piles of information to find patterns and help businesses make better choices.
scope: Highly valuable for predicting market trends, analyzing customer behavior, and improving business efficiency.

description: Protecting computers, networks, and private data from hackers and digital theft.
scope: Critical for national defense, protecting bank accounts, and securing personal privacy online.

description: Setting up and managing the technology that businesses use every day, like servers and networks.
scope: Essential for every modern office to keep their internet, databases, and computers running smoothly.

description: Designing and building robots that can help in factories, hospitals, or even homes.
scope: Moving toward the future of automated warehouses and surgical robots in modern medicine.

description: Using advanced numbers and formulas to solve real-world problems in science and money.
scope: Strong path for becoming a data analyst, an actuary for insurance, or a researcher in physics.

description: Learning how to run airports and airlines, focusing on safety, schedules, and staff.
scope: Specialized roles in ground handling, flight operations, and airport terminal management.

description: Studying how people live together in societies and why they behave the way they do.
scope: Useful for careers in community work, counseling, social research, or working for the government.

description: Managing the business side of ships, ports, and international sea trade.
scope: Career paths in shipping logistics, port authority management, and sea cargo operations.

description: Studying the earth, rocks, and minerals to find natural resources like oil or gold.
scope: Key role in finding new energy sources and studying earthquakes or environmental changes.

description: Designing and building anything with moving parts, from car engines to giant turbines.
scope: Diverse roles in the automotive industry, aerospace, and energy production plants.

description: Planning and building the things we use every day, like roads, bridges, and big buildings.
scope: Always in demand for city planning, dam construction, and highway development projects.

description: Working with electricity, power grids, and electronic devices to keep the world powered.
scope: Opportunities in renewable energy, power distribution, and making smaller, faster electronics.

description: Designing the look and structure of houses, offices, and parks so they are beautiful and safe.
scope: Can specialize in sustainable building, interior design, or large-scale urban landscaping.

description: Using chemistry to turn raw materials into useful products like gasoline, plastic, or medicine.
scope: Vital for mass-producing safe food, fuel, and healthcare products in large factories.

description: A mix of mechanical, electronic, and computer engineering to create smart machines.
scope: Leading the way in creating automated assembly lines and high-tech consumer electronics.

description: Designing and building ships, boats, and offshore platforms that work on or under the water.
scope: Niche demand in designing navy ships, luxury yachts, and cargo vessels.

description: Using satellites and maps to track location data and manage land use.
scope: Essential for digital maps, tracking climate change, and planning smart cities.

description: Finding better ways to produce energy, especially from solar, wind, and water.
scope: High future demand as the world moves away from oil toward green, renewable energy.

full_form: Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery
description: The study of the human body and how to treat sickness and injuries as a doctor.
scope: Respected global career with paths to become a surgeon, a heart specialist, or a family doctor.

description: Learning how to take care of teeth, gums, and everything related to oral health.
scope: Steady demand for dentists in private practice, hospitals, and cosmetic dentistry.

description: Learning how to care for patients, assist in medical treatment, and support healthcare services through professional nursing practices.
scope: Strong demand in hospitals, healthcare centers, emergency care, and community health services.

description: Studying how medicines work and how to make sure patients get the right drugs.
scope: Work in drug development, quality control in factories, or as a clinical pharmacist.

description: Helping people recover from pain or injury through physical exercises and therapy.
scope: Growing demand in sports medicine, elderly care, and recovery after surgery.

description: Using biology and technology to solve problems like curing diseases or making better crops.
scope: Exciting field for genetic research, vaccine development, and agricultural improvement.

description: Working behind the scenes in labs to test blood and tissue to find out what is making a patient sick.
scope: Vital part of every hospital that ensures doctors have the right data to treat patients.

description: Using machines like X-rays and Ultrasounds to see inside the body and diagnose problems.
scope: Specialized roles in medical imaging, scanning, and assisting doctors with visual data.

description: Focusing on keeping whole communities healthy through vaccines, clean water, and education.
scope: International career opportunities in preventing disease outbreaks and managing health policy.

description: Learning how businesses are organized, how they lead people, and how they grow.
scope: Very flexible degree for jobs in human resources, office management, or starting your own company.

description: Managing money, tracking profits, and making sure taxes and records are correct.
scope: Essential for every business to manage their budget, investments, and financial health.

description: Learning how to sell products using the internet, social media, and online ads.
scope: High demand for roles like content creator, social media manager, and search engine expert.

description: The study of how technology is changing money, like mobile banking and digital wallets.
scope: Emerging field focusing on making payments faster, safer, and easier through apps.

description: Treating farming as a business, from growing the food to getting it into stores.
scope: Important for managing large farms, food supply chains, and international food export.

description: Studying the human mind to understand why people feel, think, and act in certain ways.
scope: Career paths in mental health counseling, child psychology, or corporate behavior analysis.

description: Studying literature, writing, and the history of the English language.
scope: Diverse roles in teaching, professional writing, editing books, and journalism.

description: Learning how to share news and stories through TV, radio, newspapers, and the internet.
scope: Career options include news reporting, film making, public relations, and digital content.

description: Expressing ideas through drawing, painting, sculpture, and digital art.
scope: Professional paths in gallery art, animation, graphic design, and creative teaching.

description: Digging into the past to find artifacts and learn about ancient civilizations.
scope: Specialized roles in historical preservation, museum curation, and site excavation.

description: Learning how to organize books, data, and information so people can find them easily.
scope: Stable careers in managing school libraries, digital archives, and corporate data centers.

description: Learning how to build and run stores that sell products online.
scope: High demand for managing online storefronts, logistics, and digital customer service.

description: Comparing stories from different cultures and exploring creative ways to tell them.
scope: Roles in international publishing, creative writing, and cultural analysis.

description: Studying how different countries deal with each other through politics and trade.
scope: Pathways to becoming a diplomat, working in foreign policy, or for international groups.

description: The study of buying and selling, focusing on trade, markets, and general business.
scope: General path into office jobs, retail management, and small business operations.

description: Learning the best ways to teach students and how to manage schools and classrooms.
scope: Careers in primary or secondary teaching, school administration, and educational planning.

description: Studying the rules of the country and how to represent people in legal matters.
scope: High demand for lawyers in criminal, corporate, family, and international law.

description: Learning to speak, read, and write foreign languages while understanding their cultures.
scope: Opportunities as a translator, interpreter, or working in international tourism.
